collectors.usage: Designed to retarget you with ads based on shopping and browsing signals.
Designed to measure your behavior on the site.

risk.verdict: Heavy tracking. Many advertisers and data brokers are watching.

factors.label: Device fingerprinting observed
factors.detail: 2 fingerprinting techniques (audio, WebRTC) actually ran on this page — these can recognise your device without cookies.

factors.label: Third-party trackers contacted
factors.detail: 2 known tracking domains loaded resources on this page.

factors.label: Advertising & data-broker cookies
factors.detail: 2 cookies used to target ads or sell audience data.

factors.label: Number of companies receiving data
factors.detail: 2 separate companies can associate this visit with you.

factors.label: Long-lived tracking cookies
factors.detail: 4 tracking cookies persist for more than 6 months.

factors.label: Analytics cookies
factors.detail: 2 cookies measuring your behavior on the site.

factors.label: Cookies missing the Secure flag
factors.detail: 1 cookie could be sent over an unencrypted connection.

factors.label: Unrecognized third-party connections
factors.detail: 3 other third-party domains were contacted but aren't in our known list — unverified, worth a look.
